issue_summary: Change the behavior of Service.Listener and ServiceManager.Listener such that we guarantee that listener callbacks (for a single listener) will never be called concurrently. Previously, the only semantics we guaranteed was about the order in which callbacks were submitted to executor.execute. This significantly strengthens those guarantees.
javadoc_before: /** Attempts to execute all the listeners in {@link #queuedListeners}. */
javadoc_after: /** Attempts to execute all the listeners in {@link #listeners}. */
